/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/run_command_plan.dir/run_command_plan.cc.o CMakeFiles/run_command_plan.dir/CommandSender.cc.o CMakeFiles/run_command_plan.dir/CommandBuilder.cc.o CMakeFiles/run_command_plan.dir/CommandSaver.cc.o -o run_command_plan   -L/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib -lreadline -lANLNext /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_system.dylib
